Returning a Clone Replacement to Action Return the clone (and his player) to action ‘as soon as possible. A player with a dead Character is just a spectator, which is nowhere near as much fun as playing Paranoia. Give the player some time to agonize over the un. timely demise of his character, but remember = he came to play, not to watch. Well, de gustibus non est disputandum, That's why we're including a whole slew of optional combat rues, for those ‘of you who want more complexity oF realism. Semi-seriously, many optional rules are useful or fun, For instance, in the basic com bat rules we tell you to modify skill numbers for the conditions under which characters at- tack, but don't give you a lot of guidelines for ‘exaclly what modifiers are appropriate. “More Skill Modifiers,” below, makes some sugges tions.
